issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: create-products-index-with-custom-analyzers
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric, while Response A fails on index name, analyzer names, and field structure.

scenarios.name: search-products-with-boosting-and-aggregations
scenarios.rationale: Response A meets most rubric requirements but lacks should clauses and name highlighting, whereas Response B fails on many core aspects such as URL, fuzziness, price range, boosts, highlighting, size, and aggregation details.
